Home / Service Areas / Novi

Welding in Novi, MI

Trusted local professionals serving Novi and surrounding communities

Serving Novi, MI

Legacy Welding provides top-notch welding services for Novi's rapidly growing residential and commercial sectors. Our team handles everything from small repairs to large-scale fabrication, ensuring precision and durability. Novi's mix of modern homes and businesses requires versatile welding solutions, and we deliver with expertise. Novi's cold winters and lake-effect snow necessitate welding that can withstand harsh weather. Our weather-resistant techniques ensure your metal structures remain secure and functional. Whether for a home or business, Legacy Welding is Novi's trusted welding partner.

Novi is a dynamic city with a strong economy, diverse population, and excellent amenities.

Welding Services in Novi

Structural Steel Repair

Restore compromised steel beams, columns, and connections in Detroit-area buildings.

Learn more →

Residential Metal Fabrication

Custom wrought iron, steel, and aluminum features for Metro Detroit homes.

Learn more →

Commercial Welding

Code-compliant welding for Detroit-area businesses and institutions.

Learn more →

Historic Restoration Welding

Preservation-grade metalwork for Detroit's architectural treasures.

Learn more →

Emergency Welding Services

24/7 response when critical welds fail in Metro Detroit.

Learn more →

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Novi and the surrounding area.
